pages.title: Problem: "No Importers/Exporters in target dropdown"
pages.text: $(bold)Cause$(): No gates placed in CM dimension$(br2)$(bold)Solution$(): $(li)Enter CM dimension (right-click CM with Personal Shrinking Device) $(li)Place at least one Importer or Exporter $(li)Exit CM dimension $(li)Reopen PreFab GUI - dropdown should populate

pages.title: Problem: "Importers/Exporters have no UUID/Name in GUI"
pages.text: $(bold)Cause$(): Gates not named with frequency system$(br2)$(bold)Solution$() (optional): $(li)Hold an item (e.g., Coal) $(li)Right-click Importer/Exporter $(li)Gate now shows as "Coal Importer" in dropdown$(br2)If still showing UUID only: $(li)This is normal behavior (UUID is the unique ID) $(li)Frequency system just adds a friendly name$(br2)---
